name: TestGetWaitEventSysVarData
title: TestGetWaitEventSysVarData
syntax: long testGetWaitEventSysVarData(dword index, float & value); // form 1
long testGetWaitEventSysVarData(dword index, char value[], dword length); // form 2
long testGetWaitEventSysVarData(dword index, float value[], dword length); // form 3
long testGetWaitEventSysVarData(dword index, int64 & value); // form 4
description: Retrieves the system variable value that has led to the resume of a joined wait statement.

parameters.name: Note Use the int64 parameters for system variables of UInt64 and Int64 type to cover the whole value range. The int64 parameter is interpreted for system variables of UInt64 type as qword (uint64).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
